title: Shirakami Fubuki Foxes
description: Turns snow foxes into a popular Vtuber: Shirakami Fubuki. Which is very cute...
body:
# This is Vtuber Shirakami Fubuki!

- Shirakami Fubuki (白上フブキ) is a female Japanese Virtual Youtuber associated with hololive, debuting as part of its first generation of VTubers but now in Minecraft!

# Features
- Turns Snow foxes into Fubuki when activated 
- Simple and clear voicelines recorded from Vtuber Fubuki
- Model animated
- Wavy fluffy fox tail

# Notes

- This pack contains many voicelines that annoying when you spamming to much fox!
- Required Optifine!

# Enjoy
